key_facts: Founded 2005 in UK; ENF.com.cn is the China-facing directory
October 2022: Seed funding from Qingsong Fund and CoStone Capital (Shenzhen-based)
ENF installer directory is primary B2B marketplace for matching solar buyers with Chinese suppliers
Used globally by project developers, installers, and buyers to vet Chinese manufacturers

funding_history.notes: China-focused seed round suggesting expansion of China-market services beyond directory listing

business_model_notes: Directory + qualification marketplace. Revenue: premium supplier listings, lead generation (buyers pay for verified contact info), advertising. The 'verified' badge system (factory audits, certification checks) creates a quality signal that is valuable to international buyers who cannot easily audit Chinese manufacturers directly. ENF.com.cn domestic China version primarily serves Chinese project developers looking for domestic supplier comparisons.
competitive_position: Global multilingual solar B2B directory leader. Solarbe.com dominates Chinese-language domestic traffic; ENF dominates international buyer traffic sourcing from China. With 2022 Chinese institutional investment (Qingsong + CoStone), expanding domestic China services.
research_notes: Medium confidence. Revenue figure is company self-reported. Funding round confirmed via multiple VC database sources. ENF's 65,000 company and 91,000 product figures are from company website. The 2022 China-investor seed round is analytically interesting — suggests ENF positioning as a China-to-world B2B platform, not just a Western buyers' guide to China.
